case_title: ROMEL VALDEZ ET AL VS. SUNLIGHT EXPRESS TOUR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-01-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROMEL VALDEZ AND MERLYN VALDEZ ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUNLIGHT EXPRESS TOUR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS ROMEL VALDEZ AND MERLYN VALDEZ ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUNLIGHT EXPRESS TOUR NOT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
